subcodes.first_line: O Shoghi! What thou hast written and the inner secret thou didst cherish have become known and manifest. The contents are replete with attention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شوقیا آنچه نگاشتی و راز درون داشتی معلوم و مشهود گردید مضمون مشحون بتوجه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @education of children; moral education
